tEn: Xiaomi-Robotics-1: Scaling Vision-Language-Action Models with over 100K Hours of Real-World Trajectories
tZh: 小米机器人-1：基于超过10万小时真实世界轨迹的视觉-语言-动作模型规模化
sEn: Xiaomi-Robotics-1 is a foundational VLA model that scales with data and model size, achieving SOTA on multiple benchmarks.
sZh: 小米机器人-1是一个基础视觉-语言-动作模型，通过超过10万小时真实世界轨迹的预训练和高效后训练，在多个基准上达到最先进水平。
absEn: We present Xiaomi-Robotics-1, a foundational vision-language-action (VLA) model capable of (1) following diverse language instructions to perform a wide range of mobile manipulation tasks in unseen environments out-of-the-box, and (2) efficiently adapting to novel downstream tasks with minimal fine-tuning data. We propose a two-stage training recipe consisting of pre-training and post-training. During pre-training, we imbue the model with broad and generalizable action-generation capabilities by training on over 100k hours of real-world manipulation trajectories collected via UMI devices. Crucially, we develop a scalable auto-labeling pipeline that annotates trajectory clips with natural languages describing scene state transitions, providing rich and precise conditioning for action learning. During post-training, we aim to align these capabilities with robot embodiments and imperative instructions that humans naturally use to prompt robots. Extensive experiments demonstrate strong scaling behavior. Xiaomi-Robotics-1 consistently improves with increased data scales and model sizes during pre-training. This scaling behavior directly transfers to post-training, where a stronger pre-training model yields better out-of-the-box real-robot performance in unseen environments. Furthermore, Xiaomi-Robotics-1 serves as a strong robot foundation policy that can be efficiently fine-tuned on complex, dexterous tasks with high data efficiency. Across multiple simulation benchmarks, Xiaomi-Robotics-1 outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Notably, it establishes a new state-of-the-art with a 57.6% success rate on RoboCasa365, surpassing the previous best of 46.6%. Furthermore, it achieves an average score of 20.07 on RoboDojo, significantly outperforming the prior state-of-the-art (13.07). Code and model checkpoints will be released. Project page: https://robotics.xiaomi.com/xiaomi-robotics-1.html
absZh: 我们提出了小米机器人-1，一个基础的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型，能够（1）遵循多样化的语言指令，在未见过的环境中开箱即用地执行广泛的移动操作任务，以及（2）通过最少的微调数据高效适应新的下游任务。我们提出了一种两阶段训练方案，包括预训练和后训练。在预训练阶段，我们通过在超过10万小时的真实世界操作轨迹（通过UMI设备收集）上训练，赋予模型广泛且可泛化的动作生成能力。关键的是，我们开发了一个可扩展的自动标注流水线，用自然语言描述场景状态转换来注释轨迹片段，为动作学习提供丰富且精确的条件。在后训练阶段，我们旨在将这些能力与机器人本体以及人类自然用于提示机器人的命令性指令对齐。大量实验展示了强大的缩放行为。小米机器人-1在预训练期间随着数据规模和模型大小的增加而持续改进。这种缩放行为直接转移到后训练中，更强的预训练模型在未见过的环境中产生更好的开箱即用真实机器人性能。此外，小米机器人-1作为一个强大的机器人基础策略，可以在复杂、灵巧的任务上高效微调，具有高数据效率。在多个模拟基准上，小米机器人-1优于最先进的方法。值得注意的是，它在RoboCasa365上以57.6%的成功率建立了新的最先进水平，超过了之前的最佳46.6%。此外，它在RoboDojo上取得了20.07的平均分数，显著优于之前的最先进水平（13.07）。代码和模型检查点将发布。项目页面：https://robotics.xiaomi.com/xiaomi-robotics-1.html

contrib.en: Proposes Xiaomi-Robotics-1, a VLA model for diverse mobile manipulation in unseen environments.
contrib.zh: 提出Xiaomi-Robotics-1，一个能在未知环境中执行多样化移动操作的VLA模型。

contrib.en: Develops a two-stage training recipe with pre-training on 100K+ hours of real-world trajectories.
contrib.zh: 开发两阶段训练方案，在超过10万小时的真实世界轨迹上进行预训练。

contrib.en: Introduces a scalable auto-labeling pipeline for annotating trajectory clips with natural language.
contrib.zh: 引入可扩展的自动标注流程，用自然语言标注轨迹片段。

contrib.en: Demonstrates strong scaling behavior: performance improves with data scale and model size.
contrib.zh: 展示强缩放行为：性能随数据规模和模型大小提升。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on RoboCasa365 (57.6%) and RoboDojo (20.07).
Serves as a robot foundation policy for efficient fine-tuning on complex tasks.
contrib.zh: 作为机器人基础策略，可在复杂任务上高效微调。

limits.en: Pre-training data limited to mobile manipulation tasks, not general robotics.
limits.zh: 预训练数据仅限于移动操作任务，非通用机器人。

limits.en: Auto-labeling pipeline may introduce noise in language annotations.
limits.zh: 自动标注流程可能在语言标注中引入噪声。

limits.en: Post-training alignment assumes human imperative instructions, limiting flexibility.
limits.zh: 后训练对齐假设人类指令式语言，限制灵活性。

limits.en: Scaling behavior may not hold for extremely large models or data beyond tested ranges.
limits.zh: 缩放行为可能不适用于超出测试范围的极大模型或数据。

limits.en: Real-world evaluation limited to unseen environments; long-term robustness not assessed.
limits.zh: 真实世界评估仅限于未知环境；未评估长期鲁棒性。
